lines.english: Did the young man speak English?
lines.chinese: 那个年轻人会说英语吗？
lines.raw: Did the young man speak English? | 那个年轻人会说英语吗？

lines.english: I had an amusing experience last year.
lines.chinese: 去年我有一个有趣的经历。
lines.raw: I had an amusing experience last year. | 去年我有一个有趣的经历。

lines.english: After I had left a small village in the south of France,
lines.chinese: 在我离开法国南部的一个小村庄后，
lines.raw: After I had left a small village in the south of France, | 在我离开法国南部的一个小村庄后，

lines.english: I drove on to the next town.
lines.chinese: 我驱车前往下一个城镇。
lines.raw: I drove on to the next town. | 我驱车前往下一个城镇。

lines.english: On the way, a young man waved to me.
lines.chinese: 在路上，一个年轻人向我招手。
lines.raw: On the way, a young man waved to me. | 在路上，一个年轻人向我招手。

lines.english: I stopped and he asked me for a lift.
lines.chinese: 我停了下来，他请求我搭他一程。
lines.raw: I stopped and he asked me for a lift. | 我停了下来，他请求我搭他一程。

lines.english: As soon as he had got into the car,
lines.raw: As soon as he had got into the car, | 他一上车，

lines.english: I said good morning to him in French and he replied in the same language.
lines.chinese: 我就用法语向他问好，他也用同样的语言回答我。
lines.raw: I said good morning to him in French and he replied in the same language. | 我就用法语向他问好，他也用同样的语言回答我。
Apart from a few words, | 除了一些词语，

lines.english: I do not know any French at all.
lines.raw: I do not know any French at all. | 我一点法语也不会。

lines.english: Neither of us spoke during the journey.
lines.chinese: 在旅途中，我们两人都没有说话。
lines.raw: Neither of us spoke during the journey. | 在旅途中，我们两人都没有说话。

lines.english: I had nearly reached the town, when the young man suddenly said, very slowly,
lines.chinese: 我快到城镇时，那个年轻人突然非常缓慢地说，
lines.raw: I had nearly reached the town, when the young man suddenly said, very slowly, | 我快到城镇时，那个年轻人突然非常缓慢地说，
'Do you speak English?' | “你会说英语吗？”

lines.english: As I soon learnt, he was English himself!
lines.chinese: 我很快了解到，他自己就是英国人！
lines.raw: As I soon learnt, he was English himself! | 我很快了解到，他自己就是英国人！
